name: ice-detention-data
title: ICE Detention Facility Data
description: Supplemental data tables for the ICE detention facility pipeline: DMCP authorized facility rosters (2015, 2017), DDP daily population summaries, and related reference data.

sources.title: 2015 ICE Detention Facility Listing
sources.author: ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations, Custody Management Division

sources.title: ICE DMCP Facility List — ERO Custody Management Division, FY2017
sources.author: ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations, Custody Management Division
sources.note: Published by Prison Legal News; underlying document is U.S. government public domain.

sources.title: Deportation Data Project — Daily Detained Population
sources.author: Deportation Data Project
sources.note: Daily detainee population counts by facility, sourced from ICE detention monitoring data via FOIA.

resources.name: faclist15
resources.description: DMCP authorized facility listing, snapshot dated 2015-12-08. 209 rows × 39 columns. Contains FY2010–FY2016 ADP history per facility; FY2016 column covers approximately the first 70 days of that fiscal year. Generated by the faclist15 target in _targets.R.

fields.name: detloc
fields.description: ICE internal facility identifier code (DETLOC). All-caps alphanumeric, 3–8 characters.

fields.name: facility_name
fields.description: Facility name. Title case; common abbreviations expanded (e.g. 'Ctr.' → 'Center').

fields.name: facility_address
fields.description: Street address. Title case.

fields.name: facility_city
fields.description: City. Title case.

fields.name: facility_county
fields.description: County name. Title case.

fields.name: facility_state
fields.description: Two-letter U.S. state abbreviation.

fields.name: facility_zip
fields.description: 5-digit ZIP code, zero-padded. Coerced from numeric via str_pad to preserve leading zeros (e.g. New England ZIP codes).

fields.name: facility_type
fields.description: Broad ICE facility type category from DMCP source data. A 4-value grouping that collapses DIGSA into IGSA. Not propagated into downstream pipeline products.

fields.name: facility_type_detailed
fields.description: Detailed ICE facility type. Values include DIGSA, IGSA, USMS IGA, USMS CDF, SPC, BOP, CDF, FAMILY, STATE, STAGING, DOD. Matches facility_type_detailed in the main FY panel.

fields.name: facility_male_female
fields.description: Detainee sex accepted. Values: Male, Female, Female/Male.

fields.name: facility_levels
fields.description: Accepted detainee classification levels. Typically 'A, B, C, D' or a subset.

fields.name: facility_capacity
fields.description: Total authorized bed capacity. Distinct from inspections_guaranteed_minimum in the FY panel (total beds, not contracted minimum). NA when facility_capacity_as_needed is TRUE (49 facilities).

fields.name: facility_capacity_as_needed
fields.description: TRUE for the 49 facilities whose raw Capacity cell contains 'AS NEEDED' rather than a numeric bed count. These are IGSA jails that accept ICE detainees on demand with no fixed authorized capacity. facility_capacity is NA for these rows.

fields.name: facility_population_count
fields.description: Detainee population count at time of data snapshot (2015-12-08).

fields.name: fy16_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2016 (partial year through 2015-12-08).

fields.name: fy15_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2015 (full year).

fields.name: fy14_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2014.

fields.name: fy13_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2013.

fields.name: fy12_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2012.

fields.name: fy11_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2011.

fields.name: fy10_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2010.

fields.name: facility_operator
fields.description: Entity operating the facility (e.g. GEO, CCA, COUNTY (SHERIFF)).

fields.name: facility_owner
fields.description: Entity that owns the facility (e.g. GEO, COUNTY, CITY, ICE).

fields.name: contract_initiation_date
fields.description: Best known ICE contract initiation date. 'Best known' = earliest ICE contract date on record, which may not be the original contract date.

fields.name: contract_expiration_date
fields.description: Best known contract expiration date. Missing for many facilities on open-ended or intergovernmental agreements.

fields.name: per_diem_rate_detailed
fields.description: Per diem rate details. Free-text; typically includes a guaranteed minimum (GM) bed count and tiered per-diem rates in USD (e.g. '1455 (GM); $111.92 (1-1455), $42.36 (1456-1940)').

fields.name: authorizing_authority
fields.description: ICE authority authorizing the facility. Typically 'DMCP'.

fields.name: over_under_72
fields.description: Whether the facility is authorized to hold detainees for more or fewer than 72 hours.

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_type
fields.description: Most recent inspection type. Values include Regular, ORSA, PREOCC (Pre-Occupancy).

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_standard
fields.description: Inspection standard applied. Values include PBNDS 2011, PBNDS 2008, NDS, IFSA.

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_rating_final
fields.description: Final rating from the most recent inspection. Values: Meets Standard, Acceptable, Superior, Does Not Meet Standard, Pending, Deficient.

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_date
fields.description: Date of the most recent inspection.

fields.name: cy15_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2015.

fields.name: cy14_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2014.

fields.name: cy13_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2013.

fields.name: cy12_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2012.

fields.name: cy11_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2011.

fields.name: cy10_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2010.

fields.name: dsm_assigned
fields.description: Whether a Detention Service Manager is assigned to the facility.

resources.name: faclist17
resources.description: DMCP authorized facility listing, snapshot dated 2017-07-10. 201 rows × 41 columns. Contains FY2010–FY2017 ADP history per facility. Parsed from a 4-page fixed-width PDF using pdftools::pdf_data(). Generated by the faclist17 target in _targets.R. Schema identical to faclist15 plus fy17_adp (after facility_population_count), cy16_rating (before cy15_rating), and facility_capacity_as_needed (after facility_capacity).

fields.name: detloc
fields.description: ICE internal facility identifier code (DETLOC). All-caps alphanumeric, 3–8 characters.

fields.name: facility_name
fields.description: Facility name. Title case; common abbreviations expanded (e.g. 'Ctr.' → 'Center').

fields.name: facility_address
fields.description: Street address. Title case.

fields.name: facility_city
fields.description: City. Title case.

fields.name: facility_county
fields.description: County name. Title case.

fields.name: facility_state
fields.description: Two-letter U.S. state abbreviation.

fields.name: facility_zip
fields.description: 5-digit ZIP code, zero-padded. Coerced from character via str_pad. PDF source already provides character strings; padding ensures uniformity.

fields.name: facility_type
fields.description: Broad ICE facility type category from DMCP source data. A 4-value grouping that collapses DIGSA into IGSA. Not propagated into downstream pipeline products.

fields.name: facility_type_detailed
fields.description: Detailed ICE facility type. Values include DIGSA, IGSA, USMS IGA, USMS CDF, SPC, BOP, CDF, FAMILY, STATE, STAGING, DOD. Matches facility_type_detailed in the main FY panel.

fields.name: facility_male_female
fields.description: Detainee sex accepted. Values: Male, Female, Female/Male.

fields.name: facility_levels
fields.description: Accepted detainee classification levels. Typically 'A, B, C, D' or a subset.

fields.name: facility_capacity
fields.description: Total authorized bed capacity. Distinct from inspections_guaranteed_minimum in the FY panel (total beds, not contracted minimum). NA when facility_capacity_as_needed is TRUE (98 facilities).

fields.name: facility_capacity_as_needed
fields.description: TRUE for the 98 facilities whose raw capacity cell contains 'AS NEEDED' rather than a numeric bed count. These are IGSA jails that accept ICE detainees on demand with no fixed authorized capacity. facility_capacity is NA for these rows.

fields.name: facility_population_count
fields.description: Detainee population count at time of data snapshot (2017-07-10).

fields.name: fy17_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2017 (partial year through 2017-07-10).

fields.name: fy16_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2016 (full year).

fields.name: fy15_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2015.

fields.name: fy14_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2014.

fields.name: fy13_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2013.

fields.name: fy12_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2012.

fields.name: fy11_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2011.

fields.name: fy10_adp
fields.description: Average Daily Population, FY2010.

fields.name: facility_operator
fields.description: Entity operating the facility (e.g. GEO, CCA, COUNTY (SHERIFF)).

fields.name: facility_owner
fields.description: Entity that owns the facility (e.g. GEO, COUNTY, CITY, ICE).

fields.name: contract_initiation_date
fields.description: Best known ICE contract initiation date. Stored as character string from PDF parsing (format varies); not coerced to date.

fields.name: contract_expiration_date
fields.description: Best known contract expiration date. Stored as character string from PDF parsing. Missing for many facilities.

fields.name: per_diem_rate_detailed
fields.description: Per diem rate details. Free-text; typically includes a guaranteed minimum (GM) bed count and tiered per-diem rates in USD.

fields.name: authorizing_authority
fields.description: ICE authority authorizing the facility. Typically 'DMCP'.

fields.name: over_under_72
fields.description: Whether the facility is authorized to hold detainees for more or fewer than 72 hours.

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_type
fields.description: Most recent inspection type. Values include Regular, ORSA, PREOCC (Pre-Occupancy).

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_standard
fields.description: Inspection standard applied. Values include PBNDS 2011, PBNDS 2008, NDS, IFSA.

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_rating_final
fields.description: Final rating from the most recent inspection. Values: Meets Standard, Acceptable, Superior, Does Not Meet Standard, Pending, Deficient.

fields.name: inspections_last_inspection_date
fields.description: Date of the most recent inspection. Stored as character string from PDF parsing.

fields.name: cy16_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2016.

fields.name: cy15_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2015.

fields.name: cy14_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2014.

fields.name: cy13_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2013.

fields.name: cy12_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2012.

fields.name: cy11_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2011.

fields.name: cy10_rating
fields.description: Annual inspection rating for calendar year 2010.

fields.name: dsm_assigned
fields.description: Whether a Detention Service Manager is assigned to the facility.

resources.name: ddp-fy25-summary
resources.description: DDP daily population data summarized to one row per facility for Fiscal Year 2025 (Oct 1, 2024 – Sep 30, 2025). 853 facility codes × 15 columns. Each ADP column is the mean of the corresponding daily count over 365 observation days. Covers a broader set of facilities than the ICE annual statistics spreadsheet, including hold rooms, staging facilities, and federal prisons.

fields.name: detention_facility_code
fields.description: ICE facility code (DETLOC). All-caps alphanumeric, unique identifier for each row.

fields.name: detention_facility
fields.description: Facility name, cleaned to project standards (title case, abbreviation normalization).

fields.name: state
fields.description: Two-letter U.S. state or territory abbreviation.

fields.name: n_days
fields.description: Number of days with a population observation in the FY25 window. All rows are 365 in this file.

fields.name: adp_total
fields.description: Average daily population (total detained), computed as mean(n_detained) over the n_days observation days. Includes individuals booked in and out within the same day.

fields.name: adp_midnight
fields.description: Average daily population at midnight count, computed as mean(n_detained_at_midnight). Captures only those physically present at midnight; typically lower than adp_total.

fields.name: adp_male
fields.description: Average daily population of male detainees, from mean(n_detained_male).

fields.name: adp_female
fields.description: Average daily population of female detainees, from mean(n_detained_female).

fields.name: adp_convicted_criminal
fields.description: Average daily population of detainees classified as convicted criminals, from mean(n_detained_convicted_criminal).

fields.name: adp_possibly_under_18
fields.description: Average daily population of detainees flagged as possibly under 18 years old, from mean(n_detained_possibly_under_18).

fields.name: peak_population
fields.description: Maximum single-day total detained population during FY25.

fields.name: peak_date
fields.description: Date on which peak_population occurred. If tied, the first date is used.

fields.name: adp_non_criminal
fields.description: Average daily population of detainees not classified as convicted criminals. Derived as adp_total - adp_convicted_criminal.

fields.name: share_non_crim
fields.description: Share of ADP that is non-criminal: adp_non_criminal / adp_total. Ranges from 0 to 1.

fields.name: share_female
fields.description: Share of ADP that is female: adp_female / adp_total. Ranges from 0 to 1.

resources.name: vera-type-coding
resources.description: Vera Institute facility type groupings (Table 2 from ICE Detention Trends: Technical Appendix, Smart & Lawrence 2023). Maps ICE facility_type_detailed codes to Vera's 8-category facility type vocabulary. Manually transcribed from the PDF appendix into an R tribble. Used by classify_vera_category() in R/aggregate.R.

sources.title: ICE Detention Trends: Technical Appendix — Table 2
sources.author: Noelle Smart and Zachary Lawrence, Vera Institute of Justice

fields.name: category_vera
fields.description: Vera's 8-value facility type grouping: Non-Dedicated, Dedicated, Federal, Hold/Staging, Family/Youth, Medical, Hotel, Other/Unknown.

fields.name: type_detailed_ice
fields.description: ICE facility type code (e.g. IGSA, DIGSA, CDF, SPC, BOP). Corresponds to facility_type_detailed in the pipeline.

fields.name: description_ice
fields.description: Plain-language description of the ICE facility type code, as provided in the Vera appendix.
